case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS RANDALL ROCHELLE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $587.27 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT RANDALL ROCHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $717.03 AS TO DEFENDANT RANDALL ROCHELLE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RANDALL ROCHELLE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RANDALL ROCHELLE
